subject: An abstract dark creature composed of branching shadow-limbs and claws pressed against or emerging from a textured surface
description: A dark entity fills most of the frame, its form made up of radiating spindly branch-like limbs with hooked claw tips, rendered in deep blue-black with faint blue highlights suggesting a glossy or wet surface. The creature appears to be flat against or emerging from a textured wall or surface with warm ochre and pale pink tones, suggesting plaster or paper with visible marks and scribblings. The figure has no clearly defined head — only the suggestion of a central mass with glowing points that could be eyes. The overall impression is of something spreading and invasive, occupying every corner of the frame.
background: textured ochre and pale surface with marks
